content: For current folders, click view>sort by and tick unthreaded For future folders, click settings>appearance and set as desired. If menu bar is not visible, click alt key first.
creator: davidsk

content:
https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/message-threading-thunderbird is found by typing 

   "threading"

into the support search field and choosing "Help articles only".

KB (help) articles are your friend.
creator: wsmwk

content: What is your operating system? What was the source of your previous version of Thunderbird (a "Store? a stand-alone installer?) How did you go about upgrading? I ask because different platforms may expect to find your profile in different places, which is why it's best to remain consistent.
creator: rednoise

content:
OS Windows 10. I've used Thunderbird for years, and it tells me there is an upgrade so I download and install within the Thunderbird program or sometimes I use 10bit software updater. This version gives me a link to my profile but it's my new one, with everything missing. I never searched for my profile before because it was never an issue.
